Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Audio Stream Generator with Mistral AI integration

- Audio streaming application with real-time effects
- Mistral AI integration for dynamic parameter generation
- Tkinter UI with volume, pitch, and octave sliders
- Waveform visualization using matplotlib
- Random and manual build-up/climax triggers
- Support for WAV file playback with real-time processing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
